## X-Sense Home Security v1.3.11.2

### 📷 Cameras
- Adds an APK-aligned camera AI notification history poll using the X-Sense app service list and history paths.
- Polls camera AI notification history every 60 seconds so motion and AI detection can update even when the live MQTT event path does not deliver an event.
- Deduplicates camera AI history records by service and event ID to avoid replaying the same notification.

### 🐛 Fixes
- Fixes a case where camera motion and AI detection could remain unchanged because no X-Sense MQTT event was received.
- Keeps the existing MQTT event path while adding the APK history path as a native fallback.

### 🛠️ Debug
- Adds redacted debug logging for camera AI history polling, routed history events, missing AI services, and unmatched history events.

### ✅ Validation
- Adds regression coverage for the APK AI notification service list, AI notification history calls, history event routing, deduplication, and the lightweight history poller.
